adapter_fields.finding: The physical context is real but already contains the adaptation machinery.
adapter_fields.value: host lineage genome, CRISPR array, Cas adaptation machinery, nucleotide chemistry, and phage/plasmid exposure context

adapter_fields.finding: The admissibility predicate is supplied by fixed Cas machinery, sequence chemistry, and environmental encounter conditions rather than generated as a new source-side law.
adapter_fields.value: protospacer, PAM, processing, integration, and survival predicate

adapter_fields.finding: The candidate has a concrete before/after genomic formation trace.
adapter_fields.value: new spacer insertion into the CRISPR array

adapter_fields.finding: The witness can be preserved without granting source issuance.
adapter_fields.value: sequenced spacer record, integration locus, and immunity phenotype

adapter_fields.finding: The successor context is an occupied member of a fixed sequence and recombination family, not a source-owned new construction grammar.
adapter_fields.value: same biochemical source with one additional nucleotide record

adapter_fields.finding: Record preservation is available and is not the blocking field.
adapter_fields.value: lineage before/after sequence trace and exposure record

exact_missing_source_object.also_required: An internal anti-after-naming principle plus W4 perturbation non-factorization under the same preserved sequence, exposure, lineage, and immunity records.
exact_missing_source_object.required: A native physical source law in which the biological source creates a new admissibility predicate or construction grammar not representable as fixed nucleotide sequence space, fixed Cas adaptation machinery, environmental boundary input, stochastic encounter, selection, or completed lineage history.

fixed_source_rival.reason: The acquired spacer is reproduced by fixed biochemical law and Cas machinery over a fixed nucleotide sequence space, with environmental boundary input, stochastic encounter/integration, selection, and a completed lineage trace.

next_required_test: another non-overlapping physical candidate with a source-owned transition law, or a bounded no-go target for biological sequence acquisition candidates under fixed sequence-space completion

witness_gates.finding: A new spacer record appears, but the source algebra remains fixed nucleotide chemistry plus fixed CRISPR/Cas adaptation operations.
Spacer admissibility is governed by pre-existing protospacer, PAM, processing, integration, and selection predicates.
The occupied sequence is new to the lineage record, but the larger nucleotide sequence and insertion family is fixed in advance.
Perturbations factor through protospacer availability, Cas expression, integration bias, repair chemistry, selection, and stochastic encounter.
The spacer insertion and downstream immunity record can be preserved.
Fixed sequence-space, whole-family, boundary-input, and after-naming absorbers are not defeated from inside the biology.
